summary: Regression testing completed for BureauSmart code quality refactoring. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend refactoring verified - DashboardPage split into 4 sub-components (UploadZone, DocumentList, AnalysisDisplay, TextModal) all rendering correctly. React hooks have proper dependencies with useMemo/useCallback. No console.error statements in production code. Python utility functions (parse_ai_json, require_subscription) working correctly.
passed_tests: User registration creates inactive subscription user
/auth/me returns correct user data for authenticated session
Paywall: Admin bypasses paywall (gets 404 for fake doc, not 403)
Landing page renders with correct price (2.99 EUR)
Dashboard page renders correctly after refactoring
DocumentList component renders with document items
AnalysisDisplay component shows full analysis (summary, action, deadline, amount, sender, options)
Logout button works and redirects to login
PRO badge visible for admin user
Upgrade button hidden for subscribed admin
Generate text buttons present for subscriber
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup with active subscription
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring verified. DashboardPage now ~300 lines with 4 extracted components. All data-testid attributes present and working. React hooks have proper dependency arrays with useMemo/useCallback. Python server has parse_ai_json() and require_subscription() utility functions. No console.error in production code.

extracted_components: DocumentList.js - Document list with priority badges
AnalysisDisplay.js - Full analysis display with options
TextModal.js - Text generation modal with improvements
react_hooks_fixed: AuthContext.js - useMemo for provider value, useCallback for functions
LanguageContext.js - useMemo for provider value, useCallback for functions
python_utilities_added: parse_ai_json() - Extract and parse JSON from AI responses
require_subscription() - Raise 403 if user not subscribed
